hero.name: Aboubakar Sidik Faha
hero.title: DevOps Engineer & Software Architect
hero.description: Transforming digital visions into reality with innovative and custom-made solutions. Expertise in cloud infrastructure, DevOps practices, and scalable software architecture.

about.title: Digital Innovator & Solutions Architect
about.subtitle: About Me
about.description: Passionate about technological innovation, I transform complex challenges into elegant and high-performing solutions. My approach combines cutting-edge technical expertise with strategic vision to create exceptional digital experiences.

development.title: Development
development.desc: Modern web applications with best practices

bio.p1: Based in Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire, I'm a passionate {role} with over 7 years of experience transforming complex technical challenges into elegant, scalable solutions.
bio.p2: I hold a {degree} from {school}, Douala, Cameroon. My journey began with a fascination for how things work under the hood, which led me to specialize in cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP), Kubernetes orchestration, CI/CD automation, and modern software architecture.
bio.p3: Currently, I'm a {current_role} while also serving as a part-time DevOps Instructor at Primus Learning, mentoring the next generation of engineers. I'm also a regular contributor to open-source projects with OSS Cameroon.
bio.degree: Professional Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering
bio.current_role: Backend DevOps Engineer at Everest Consulting (USA)

expertise.item1: Design and implement scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS and GCP (IAC with Terraform, Pulumi, Ansible)
expertise.item2: Build and optimize CI/CD pipelines using GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, and Jenkins
expertise.item3: Orchestrate containerized applications with Kubernetes (EKS, GKE)
expertise.item4: Architect microservices and distributed systems using NestJS, FastAPI, and Go
expertise.item5: Develop full-stack applications with Vue.js, React, Flutter, and Node.js
expertise.item6: Lead development teams as Scrum Master and establish engineering best practices
expertise.item7: Provide technical consulting, training, and digital transformation strategy

asernum.highlight1: Infrastructure design and management on AWS (IAC, monitoring, cost optimization)
asernum.highlight2: Writing CI/CD Pipelines and code quality checks
asernum.highlight3: Workflow automation and integration with third-party services
asernum.highlight4: IPSec VPN setup and management for secure connectivity

everest.highlight2: Writing CI/CD Pipelines and code quality checks
everest.highlight3: Infrastructure management on AWS (IAC, monitoring, cost optimization)

primus.highlight1: Live teaching DevOps to students (Docker, CI-CD, Python)

afriqasoft.highlight2: CI/CD on GitLab CI and GitHub Actions
afriqasoft.highlight4: Mobile Development (Flutter) and microservices (FastAPI, NestJS, Go)

lagence.highlight3: Published app to Play Store (internal test)

geospace.highlight1: Deployed local development environment (GitLab, Docker, Nginx)
geospace.highlight2: Deployed mail server and private cloud with NextCloud
geospace.highlight3: Maintained IT infrastructure and SEO optimization

saamea.highlight1: E-commerce site audit and technical improvements
saamea.highlight3: Infrastructure modeling and CI/CD pipeline setup

gohze.highlight2: Web application development and Docker containerization

seo.home_title: Aboubakar Sidik Faha | DevOps & Solution Architect
seo.about_desc: Learn about Aboubakar Sidik Faha, a DevOps Engineer and Software Architect with 7+ years of experience in cloud infrastructure, automation, and modern software architecture based in Abidjan, Ivory Coast.
seo.services_desc: Professional DevOps and software architecture services: Cloud infrastructure, CI/CD automation, AI/ML solutions, and full-stack web development. Based in Abidjan, Ivory Coast, serving clients worldwide.
seo.projects_desc: Explore my portfolio of cloud infrastructure, DevOps automation, AI/ML solutions, and full-stack web development projects. Enterprise-grade solutions for global clients.
seo.blog_desc: Explore articles on DevOps practices, cloud architecture, software engineering, AI/ML integration, and modern development strategies. Insights from a seasoned DevOps Engineer.
seo.contact_desc: Get in touch with Aboubakar Sidik Faha for DevOps consulting, cloud architecture projects, or software development inquiries. Based in Abidjan, Ivory Coast.
